pct_land_multifamily_byright.label: Multifamily land share
pct_land_multifamily_byright.description: Share of residential zoned land where 3+ family housing is allowed by right. Source: MA Zoning Atlas 2023.

median_home_value.label: Median home value
median_home_value.description: Median value of owner-occupied housing units. A proxy for housing cost and affordability pressure.

rent_burden_pct.label: Renters cost-burdened
rent_burden_pct.description: Share of renter households paying more than 30% of income on gross rent. High cost burden indicates housing supply shortfall.

permits_per_1000_residents.label: Permits per 1,000 residents
permits_per_1000_residents.description: Annual residential building permits averaged over the most recent multi-year period, normalized by population. Measures actual housing production.

mbta_status.label: MBTA Communities compliance
mbta_status.description: Whether the municipality has complied with the MBTA Communities Act, which requires towns served by the MBTA to zone for multifamily housing by right near transit. Non-compliant towns lose access to certain state grant programs.
mbta_status.source: MA Dept of Housing and Community Development (DHCD)
